key_metrics_output: Restriction on intentionally added synthetic polymer microparticles; regulatory compliance metrics; particle size classification; polymer type identification
abstract: Commission Regulation (EU) 2023/2055 amends Annex XVII to REACH to restrict the placing on the market of synthetic polymer microparticles. The regulation establishes restrictions on intentionally added microplastics in products, with specific size thresholds and exemptions for certain applications. The regulation applies to synthetic polymer particles and sets out compliance requirements for manufacturers and importers.

particle_size_range: particles with a size of less than 5 mm
abstract: Commission Regulation (EU) 2023/2055 amending Annex XVII to REACH
